objective: dogfood Campfire on itself and harden lifecycle verification coverage

current.milestone_title: Add a prompt-template layer for canonical Campfire operator flows
current.slice_title: Define a small reusable template format and add canonical resume, retrospective, benchmark, and improvement-promotion templates without duplicating large markdown prompt blocks
acceptance_criteria: Campfire provides a small prompt-template surface for canonical operator flows instead of relying on large hand-written markdown blocks
Canonical templates exist for resume, retrospective, benchmark, and improvement-promotion flows and stay task-only plus reusable
The template layer stays compatible with the current skill stack and local-first control-plane model

queued_milestones.milestone_title: Add deterministic verification and example coverage for prompt templates
Add a lightweight steering versus follow-up queue model for active tasks
Add packageable repo-local and generated skill discovery surfaces
Add session-lineage metadata for retries, branches, and benchmark repros

execution.notes: The self-hosted task is configured for manual-stop autonomous runs with no internal budget or milestone cap. A later review of pi-mono/coding-agent suggested a higher-leverage next backlog around prompt templates, steering queues, packageable generated skills, and session lineage, so the deferred automation-proposal backlog is parked behind this new queue.

last_run.summary: Reframed the self-hosted Campfire backlog around Pi-inspired prompt templates, steering queues, packageable generated skills, and session lineage instead of the older deferred automation-proposal helper queue.
last_run.next_step: Add the prompt-template layer, then verify and document it before moving into steering queues and session lineage.
